negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday range variance displacement decoupling reversal rank over range variance displacement decoupling pressure, adverse displacement pressure, range energy excess, path churn density, close recenter pressure, counter-settlement confirmation, participation dislocation, VWAP variance reversion pressure, session phase maturity, prior-day energy context, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0098 R0001 shows the tested range variance displacement decoupling reversal surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0098 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0099 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 2 profitable and 7 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -83.48, and worst fold rw_008 net PnL -18.97.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 0.98 total net PnL across 5 better and 4 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.
